title: Summary: Turn 3
content: Pepe is a background service that monitors token utilization; when above threshold (0.85), it uses an LLM to summarize each conversation-turn memory, computes 256‑dim local n‑gram vectors, filters by cosine similarity (>0.3) to the current goal, and writes the kept memory IDs back to session.selectedMemoryIds for future context injections. Key design decisions: local vectorization (no external embedding API), LLM summarization via existing ProviderAdapter, and passing filtered IDs through session state to avoid rewriting ContextResolver.
